evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: data integrity; resolving production incidents; organizational rigor; best practices
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: Rigour dominates: emphasis on data integrity, rigor, and best practices with no velocity signals.
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: E-commerce/sustainability product—low risk without financial/compliance framing.
evidence.data_team_maturity: BI community; best practices; established platform; Senior member of team
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: Mature: established BI community, mentorship responsibilities, and named technology stack indicate mature organization.
evidence.jd_authorship: Collaborating with business teams to define KPIs; Creating optimized datasets; conducting technical audits; Ensuring data integrity
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Specific responsibilities (dbt, Databricks, Tableau, Airflow, Git) and methodologies show hiring manager authorship.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: business teams; define KPIs; product model
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: Product-focused: supporting business team KPIs and product model analytics.
evidence.autonomy_level: define KPIs; translate needs; Managing backlog priorities; Contributing best practices
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: Strategic: priority-setting and KPI definition demonstrate direction-setting authority.
evidence.ai_role_explanation: No mention of AI or AI-assisted work expected from candidate.
evidence.testing_framing: Ensuring data integrity; resolving production incidents; organizational rigor
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: Data integrity and incident response are owned responsibilities without explicit testing framework mention.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: Moderate: operational reliability and incident response are concerns but not compliance/risk-driven.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: Structuring backend data; Creating optimized datasets; Managing backlog; technical audits
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: Fix/scale: focus on improving and managing existing infrastructure.
